title: OnOptions
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Mexico’s latest cartel violence prompts fears of ‘narcoterrorism’ in replay 1990s Colombia

items.title: This CEO Just Rebranded His B2B Company. It’s a Lesson in Manifesting
items.description: With a new name, Everpure is stepping into its next era with expanded offerings.

items.title: Blockbuster ratings start to vindicate NBC’s $7.75 billion bet on the Olympics
items.description: NBC averaged 24 million viewers across its prime afternoon coverage and Primetime in Milan, a 94% improvement over the 2022 Beijing Games.

items.title: The Creator of the Best iPhone Camera App Says Your ‘Perfect’ Photos Are Boring
items.description: Ben Sandofsky, the developer behind Halide, explains why bypassing all that computational photography might lead to better photos overall.

items.title: Northeast Corridor gathers snow at 3 inches an hour as National Weather Service calls traffic ‘nearly impossible’
items.description: Blizzard warnings stretched from Maryland to Maine, while over 5,000 flights were canceled.

items.title: Flight cancellations update: American, Delta, and United Airlines issue airport alerts as blizzard batters Northeast

items.title: This genius clamp instantly transforms your tote into a crossbody bag

items.title: Novo Nordisk’s New Weight‑Loss Drug Just Failed a Big Trial—So Why Is It Still Headed to Market?
items.description: The Danish drugmaker’s latest trial setback intensifies its high-stakes rivalry with Eli Lilly in the booming obesity market.

items.title: How ‘dumb money’ took over stock markets: $5.4 trillion of retail activity took place in 2025
items.description: All told, money coming into the market from individual investors jumped about 50% from 2023 to early 2025, JPMorgan found.

items.title: Wendy’s Is Closing Hundreds of Restaurants. Here Are 5 Leadership Realities Behind That Decision
items.description: The fast food mainstay expects “flat” global systemwide sales in 2026. Translation: no growth.

items.title: OpenAI Just Launched a Major Alliance With McKinsey and Other Consulting Giants
items.description: OpenAI is spinning up an ambitious go-to-market strategy for its new AI co-worker platform.

items.title: Self-driving taxis hit London, a city with such complex streets that it has a ‘Knowledge’ test that takes cabbies years to pass
items.description: Self-driving taxis are “a solution looking for a problem,” said Steven McNamara, general secretary of the Licensed Taxi Drivers' Association.
